meta.periodization: Block periodization: A=Hypertrophy, B=Volume, C=Strength, D=Power/Resensitization
sources: Built With Science / Dr. Eric Trexler
principles: Overhead tricep work anchors every push day - 40% more growth than pressdowns (2023 study)
Progressive volume: A=10-12 sets/muscle, B=14-16, C=8-10, D=12-14
Variant A = month 1/5/9, B = month 2/6/10, C = month 3/7/11, D = month 4/8/12

exercises.name: Bench Press
exercises.note: Primary horizontal compound

exercises.name: Incline Dumbbell Press
exercises.note: Upper chest + shoulder overlap

exercises.name: Overhead Press
exercises.note: Primary vertical compound

exercises.name: Lateral Raises
exercises.note: Lateral delt isolation - fill gap OHP misses

exercises.name: Overhead Tricep Ext
exercises.note: Long head stretch - 40% more growth than pressdowns

exercises.name: Tricep Pushdowns
exercises.note: Lateral head isolation

exercises.name: Incline Barbell Press
exercises.note: Shifts emphasis upper chest + front delt

exercises.name: Cable Fly
exercises.note: Constant tension, peak contraction

exercises.name: Arnold Press
exercises.note: Full shoulder rotation, all 3 heads

exercises.name: Cable Lateral Raise
exercises.note: Cable keeps tension at peak vs dumbbell

exercises.name: Overhead Tricep Ext
exercises.note: Long head priority - anchor of every push day

exercises.name: Dips
exercises.note: Bodyweight compound - tricep + lower chest

variants.label: C
variants.repScheme: 4-6 reps, heavy load, ~8-10 sets/muscle — resensitizes for next hypertrophy block

exercises.name: Bench Press
exercises.note: Primary strength movement, 80-85% 1RM

exercises.name: Overhead Press
exercises.note: Strength compound, heaviest of the cycle

exercises.name: Close-Grip Bench
exercises.note: Compound tricep + chest, heaviest tricep work

exercises.name: Decline Barbell Press
exercises.note: Lower pec emphasis, heavier load than incline

exercises.name: Skull Crushers
exercises.note: Long head strength in stretched position

exercises.name: Rear Delt Fly
exercises.note: Isolation only - keep shoulder health during heavy block

variants.label: D
variants.repScheme: Mixed 6-12 reps, novel movements to re-stimulate adaptation

exercises.name: KB Clean and Press
exercises.note: Athletic compound - novel motor pattern vs barbell

exercises.name: Dumbbell Floor Press
exercises.note: Eliminates shoulder stretch at bottom - novel stimulus

exercises.name: Pec Deck / Machine Fly
exercises.note: Machine - constant tension, safe heavy isolation

exercises.name: Shrugs
exercises.note: Upper trap - supports shoulder health and posture

exercises.name: Overhead Tricep Ext
exercises.note: Long head anchor, heavier than B block

exercises.name: Tricep Kickbacks
exercises.note: Novel angle - peak contraction at full extension

exercises.name: Deadlift
exercises.note: King of posterior chain - erectors, glutes, traps

exercises.name: Barbell Row
exercises.note: Horizontal thickness compound

exercises.name: Pull-Ups
exercises.note: Vertical pull - lat width, long head bicep

exercises.name: Face Pulls
exercises.note: Rear delt + rotator cuff - shoulder health essential

exercises.name: Hammer Curls
exercises.note: Brachialis + brachioradialis - adds arm thickness

exercises.name: Incline Dumbbell Curl
exercises.note: Long head stretch at bottom - greater ROM than standing

exercises.name: Lat Pulldown
exercises.note: Vertical pull - easier to feel lat vs pull-up

exercises.name: Seated Cable Row
exercises.note: Horizontal row - mid back thickness

exercises.name: Straight-Arm Pulldown
exercises.note: Pure lat isolation - elbows locked, no bicep cheating

exercises.name: Single-Arm DB Row
exercises.note: Unilateral - fixes imbalances, greater ROM

exercises.name: Cable Curl
exercises.note: Constant tension through full ROM vs dumbbell

exercises.name: Concentration Curl

exercises.name: Rack Pull
exercises.note: Deadlift variation - overloads upper back and traps above knee

exercises.name: Weighted Pull-Ups
exercises.note: Add weight plate or belt - heaviest vertical pull

exercises.name: Meadows Row
exercises.note: Landmine row - unique angle hits lower lat hard

exercises.name: Chest Supported Row
exercises.note: Eliminates lower back fatigue - pure back strength

exercises.name: Reverse Curl

exercises.name: Preacher Curl

exercises.note: Novel grip and load path vs barbell

exercises.name: Chin-Ups

exercises.name: Towel Curls

exercises.name: Leg Curl
exercises.note: Hamstring isolation - fills gap hip hinge misses at knee

exercises.name: Leg Extension
exercises.note: Quad peak contraction isolation

exercises.name: Calf Raises
exercises.note: Gastrocnemius - standing position for full stretch

exercises.name: Hip Thrust
exercises.note: Highest glute EMG exercise - glute dominant at lockout

exercises.name: Sumo Deadlift
exercises.note: Wide stance shifts load to adductors and glutes vs conventional

exercises.name: Walking Lunges
exercises.note: Unilateral - fixes quad/glute imbalances, high metabolic cost

exercises.name: Nordic Hamstring Curl
exercises.note: Eccentric overload - highest hamstring muscle damage for growth

exercises.name: Seated Calf Raise
exercises.note: Soleus emphasis - different muscle than standing calf raise

exercises.name: Glute Kickback Machine

exercises.name: Squat
exercises.note: Heavy strength work - 80-85% 1RM, longer rest 3-4 min

exercises.name: Trap Bar Deadlift
exercises.note: Neutral grip, more knee bend than conventional - safer heavy pull

exercises.name: Bulgarian Split Squat

exercises.name: Hack Squat

exercises.name: Donkey Calf Raise
